summary: Comprehensive frontend testing of BarberosControl landing page completed. All 18 test assertions passed on desktop (1920x1080) and mobile (390x844). Zero console errors during page load and interaction.
critical_code_review_comments: Pricing.jsx hardcodes test-ids using `p.name.toLowerCase()` which embeds a Spanish tilde ('salón-avanzado'). This works but is fragile (some test runners/URLs may have trouble with non-ASCII characters). Consider slugifying names removing diacritics for safer selectors.

Constants are duplicated between components; WhatsApp message is well-centralised in constants.js — good. Consider moving REGISTER_URL target=_blank/rel attrs into a small <PrimaryLink> component to DRY repeated CTA markup across Hero/Navbar/Pricing/FinalCTA.
All interactive elements include data-testid attributes — excellent for testability.
test_credentials: N/A - no auth in this app
seed_data_creation: None - static landing page, no backend.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Static landing page, no backend. All CTAs are external links (verify via getAttribute('href') instead of clicking). data-testid coverage is complete. Pricing card for 'Salón Avanzado' uses Spanish tilde in the test-id ('pricing-card-salón-avanzado', 'pricing-cta-salón-avanzado'). Floating WA button (data-testid='floating-whatsapp') uses WHATSAPP_URL with pre-encoded text. Navbar becomes glassmorphic after scrollY > 24px. Mobile menu uses AnimatePresence and lives at data-testid='navbar-mobile-menu' with mobile-link-* children.
verified_features: Page loads at / with no console errors
Navbar (logo + 6 links + register CTA) on desktop
Mobile hamburger menu opens/closes with all 6 links + CTA
Hero badge (CÓDIGO MESPRUEBA · PRIMER MES GRATIS), title, subtitle, CTAs, mockups
How it works: step-1, step-2, step-3 visible
Pricing: exactly 2 plans (Premium, Salón Avanzado), Salón Avanzado has 'Recomendado' badge, placeholder $_____, CTAs link to register URL
Final CTA: register btn -> register URL, whatsapp btn -> wa.me/542914675931 with encoded message
Floating WhatsApp visible at top and after scrolling, correct href
Footer shows BarberosControl logo, app.barberoscontrol.com, WhatsApp 2914675931, copyright
All register CTAs (navbar/hero/final/pricing) point to https://app.barberoscontrol.com/register with target=_blank
Responsive: desktop 1920x1080 and mobile 390x844 both render correctly
